html:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating Lunar Rift and defeating Celestial Scion

StructureKit

“Build the W.A.R.B.O.T. using only the most authentic parts.”

-W.A.R.B.O.T. Base

“There is only one place that this contraption can go so that the containment barrier can do its part in stabilizing the energies used.”

-W.A.R.B.O.T. Base Kit

The W.A.R.B.O.T. Base Kit is unlocked after players defeat the Celestial Scion for the first time. It can be used to build the W.A.R.B.O.T. Base in the center of Hermit Island and then players can use 3 W.A.R.B.O.T. Parts to upgrade it into W.A.R.B.O.T..

Once it is fully upgraded, any unhammered Terramite and Warbler from the last Celestial Scion fight that blocks the Phasmo-Encapsulator placement will get destroyed, dropping their loots on the ground.

StructuresCraftable Items

Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating Lunar Rift and defeating Celestial Scion
StructureKit
“Keeping it under wraps for now.”
–Wilson
“It's not too late...”
–Willow
“Wolfgang can't wait to fight big scary machine guy!”
–Wolfgang
“It destroys, is destroyed and rises anew. The cycle endures.”
–Wendy
“SOON, MY FRIEND”
–WX-78
“An unprecedented feat of technological advancement, yet thoroughly uncivilized.”
–Wickerbottom
“That's looking more like it.”
–Woodie
“Don't say I didn't warn you.”
–Maxwell
“'Tis nöt battle ready yet.”
–Wigfrid
“Maybe it won't be so cranky this time.”
–Webber
“The main course?”
–Warly
“Half big-big robot friend”
–Wormwood
“It's comin' along...”
–Winona
“The foundation of devastation, hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Big bad ironfolk body.”
–Wurt
“It's missing some parts, Woby!”
–Walter
“Again?!”
–Wanda
“Big automatons really do come in small packages.”
–Wilson
“I should incinerate this, and I'm not just saying that.”
–Willow
“Look at tiny machine guy, all tiny!”
–Wolfgang
“All that death in such a tiny package.”
–Wendy
“COMPRESSED HARDWARE”
–WX-78
“Fundamental components of a colossal, militarized automaton.”
–Wickerbottom
“How does all that fit in here?”
–Woodie
“Do we never learn?”
–Maxwell
“The seed öf an irön gölem.”
–Wigfrid
“A fun and dangerous toy to build!”
–Webber
“Must be vacuum packed!”
–Warly
“Big-big robot friend inside!”
–Wormwood
“I know I can build this thing, but should I?”
–Winona
“I'll feel no guilt until it's built!”
–Wortox
“Florp, me build.”
–Wurt
“Maybe this time it will be nice!”
–Walter
“Am I the only one who thinks this is a bad idea?”
–Wanda
W.A.R.B.O.T. Base Kit
"Build first. Panic later."

The W.A.R.B.O.T. Base Kit is unlocked after players defeat the Celestial Scion for the first time. It can be used to build the W.A.R.B.O.T. Base in the center of Hermit Island and then players can use 3 W.A.R.B.O.T. Parts to upgrade it into W.A.R.B.O.T..
Once it is fully upgraded, any unhammered Terramite and Warbler from the last Celestial Scion fight that blocks the Phasmo-Encapsulator placement will get destroyed, dropping their loots on the ground.

{{Scrapbook Info|There is only one place that this contraption can go so that the containment barrier can do its part in stabilizing the energies used.|W.A.R.B.O.T. Base Kit}}
The '''W.A.R.B.O.T. Base Kit''' is unlocked after players defeat the [[Celestial Scion]] for the first time. It can be used to build the '''W.A.R.B.O.T. Base''' in the center of [[Hermit Island]] and then players can use 3 [[W.A.R.B.O.T. Parts]] to upgrade it into [[W.A.R.B.O.T.]].

Once it is fully upgraded, any unhammered [[Terramite]] and [[Warbler]] from the last Celestial Scion fight that blocks the [[Phasmo-Encapsulator]] placement will get destroyed, dropping their loots on the ground.
